action: Escalate to plan owner for manual review.

criteria: member or broker relies on verbal confirmation
action: Escalate to Governance / Technical Review before confirming coverage position.
notes: Use when verbal statements are treated as binding.

criteria: hospital in network but doctor or department access unclear
action: Escalate to Network Team to validate the exact provider pathway.
notes: Useful for access disputes inside major hospitals.

action: Escalate to Claims / Medical Review for emergency and territory assessment.
notes: Use when overseas emergency rules are unclear.

action: Escalate to Senior Underwriting or Management for approval.

criteria: rejection reason is unclear or disputed
action: Escalate to Claims Technical Review before explaining the final reason externally.
notes: Use when rejection basis is not confidently known.

criteria: case is pending because documents or attachments may be missing
action: Escalate to Claims Operations to confirm missing-document checklist and next action.

criteria: claim or case disputed because of missing pre-approval
action: Escalate to Medical Review / Claims Review to validate whether prior approval was required and whether any exception applies.

criteria: provider says everything was submitted but case remains pending or rejected
action: Escalate to Provider Relations / Claims Operations for workflow verification and document trail confirmation.

criteria: rejection reason is unclear or disputed
action: Escalate to Claims Technical Review before explaining the final reason externally.
notes: Use when rejection basis is not confidently known.

criteria: provider says everything was submitted but case remains pending or rejected
action: Escalate to Provider Relations / Claims Operations for workflow verification and document trail confirmation.
